title: Western blotting for LRRK2 signalling in macrophages
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1leln","text":"This protocol describes the immunoblotting for components of the LRRK2 signalling pathway (LRRK2, LRRK2 pS935 and phospho-Rabs) using Invitrogen NuPage SDS-PAGE reagents and the BioRad Turbo Blot transfer system. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"6nb15","text":"Reagents:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"6vi06","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3p4ib","text":"Lysis buffer: 20 mM Tris-HCl (pH 7.5), 150 mM NaCl, 1 mM Na2EDTA, 1 mM EGTA, 1% (v/v) Triton X-100","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sub","offset":59,"length":1}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8itjr","text":"NOTE: add protease and phosphatase inhibitors fresh each time (eg Halt™ Protease and Phosphatase Inhibitor Cocktail (100X), #78440, ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4ubva","text":"Loading buffer: NuPAGE LDS sample buffer (#NP0007, ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d445i","text":"Sample reducing agent: NuPAGE sample reducing agent (#NP0009, ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fnovl","text":"4-12% Bis-Tris NuPAGE gels (eg #NP0321BOX, ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":41,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2v0m7","text":"SDS-PAGE running buffer: MES running buffer (#NP0002, ThermoFisher Scientific)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2l67p","text":"Trans-Blot® Turbo™ PVDF Transfer Packs: eg #1704157, BioRad","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"3i25u","text":"TBS-T: 50 mM Tris–HCl, pH 7.5, 150 mM NaCl, 0.05% (v/v) Tween 20. ","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bk6tb","text":"Blocking and antibody dilution buffer: 5 % (w/v) non-fat milk powder in TBS-T","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5enpe","text":"Primary and secondary antibodies (see table 1 for primary antibody suggestions)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8g83q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fetcr","text":"Equipment:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"71gp4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9bctk","text":"Gel tank (#A25977, ThermoFisher Scientific; or similar)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5s5ml","text":"Trans-Blot® Turbo™ Transfer System (1704150, BioRad)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7l15i","text":"+ standard lab equipment such as a shaker, bench top centrifuge and heat block","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Culture cells as usual in a 12-well or 6-well plate. We recommend including a control using an LRRK2 kinase inhibitor (eg MLi-2, 100 nM for 1 hr) in your sample preparation to verify phospho-Rab immunoblots.
Wash cells once in PBS

Prepare protein lysates by adding sample loading buffer and reducing agent (eg NuPAGE LDS sample buffer and reducing agent). The final protein concentration should be in the range of 1-2 µg/µL . We recommend loading 10-15 µg of total protein per lane.
Transfer SDS gel into 20% EtOH while preparing the transfer stack. Make sure the gel is submerged.

Transfer PVDF membrane into 5 % milk/TBS-T and block for 01:00:00 at RT with constant shaking. We routinely cut the membrane into three parts to be able to blot for LRRK2, a loading control and Rabs at the same time.
Add 100 μl per 12-well or 200 μl per 6 well of lysis buffer containing protease and phosphatase inhibitors. Keep samples On ice from now on.
Scrape cells using a cell lifter and transfer lysate to a 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube
Vortex and incubate on ice for 00:10:00 .
Clarify lysate by spinning at 17000 x g, , at 4 °C for 00:15:00
Transfer supernatant into a fresh 1.5 ml Eppendorf tube and store at -20 °C. Determine protein concentration using an assay of choice (eg Pierce™ Coomassie Plus Assay Kit)
Denature samples at 80 °C for 00:08:00
Prepare the SDS gel (4-12% Bis-Tris Nu-PAGE gel) by assembling the apparatus, filling the tank with MES running buffer and flushing all the wells with MES running buffer.
Spin down the samples quickly in case of condensation and load wells carefully. Include a broad range molecular weight marker (eg Broad molecular weight ladder, ab116028, Abcam).
Run the gel at 180 V for 00:35:00 .
Transfer proteins using BioRad pre-programmed protocols: Mixed MW setting (2.5A for 00:07:00 ).
Prepare the transfer stack according to the manufacturer's instructions.

Prepare primary antibodies in 5 % milk/TBS-T and incubate membranes in antibody solution at 4 °C Overnight with constant shaking A B C 1 Target Catalogue no (Supplier) Dilution 2 pan-phospho-Rab ab230260 (Abcam) 1:1000 3 Rab8A 6975S (Cell Signaling) 1:1000 4 Rab10 pT73 ab230261 (Abcam) 1:1000 5 Rab10 8127S (Cell Signaling) 1:1000 6 LRRK2 pS935 ab133450 (Abcam) 1:1000 7 LRRK2 ab133474 (Abcam) 1:1000 8 beta-Actin A1978-200UL (Sigma-Aldrich) 1:5000 Table 1: Antibodies which are commonly used in our lab. Note: multiplexing for phopsho- and total protein signal is possible depending on the antibodies used. We strip and re-plot for total protein after detection of the phospho signal as all LRRK2 and Rab antibodies listed here are raised in rabbit.
Wash membranes by shaking in TBS-T for 5-10 min
Repeat the wash step 2x
Repeat washing steps as above.
Detect signal using appropriate detection equipment.

Depending on the primary antibodies and the detection method used, it might be necessary to strip the blot using a Western Blot Stripping buffer (eg #T7135A, Takara Bio) for 00:10:00 at RT and repeat the primary and secondary antibody incubation steps.
creator: Susanne Herbst
